virtualInstrument.title: Virtual instrument
virtualInstrument.description: MIDI messages will be sent to the logs
virtualInstrument.enabled: Virtual instrument enabled - MIDI messages will be sent to logs

debugButton.title: Debug Button
debugButton.description: Shows the button to open the debug console

calibrationButton.title: Calibration Microphone Button
calibrationButton.description: Shows the microphone button to calibrate audio delays for instruments

lightingButton.title: Lighting Control Button
lightingButton.description: Shows the light bulb button to manage LED strips and lighting rules

playlistButton.title: Playlist Button
playlistButton.description: Shows the playlist button in the navigation bar

keyboardButton.title: Virtual Keyboard Button
keyboardButton.description: Shows the virtual MIDI keyboard button in the navigation bar

loadingAnimation.title: Loading Animation
loadingAnimation.description: Displays an animation with a progress bar on launch. If disabled, the animation only shows on first load (cache cleared).

midiClock.title: MIDI Clock
midiClock.description: Send MIDI clock signal (24 PPQ) to connected instruments to synchronize arpeggiators, LFOs and sequencers

serialMidi.title: Serial MIDI (GPIO)
serialMidi.description: Use Raspberry Pi UART GPIO pins as MIDI IN/OUT ports (requires hardware circuit)
serialMidi.clickScan: Click "Scan" to detect available serial ports
serialMidi.noPorts: No serial ports detected. Check /boot/config.txt UART overlays
serialMidi.notAvailable: serialport package not installed. Run: npm install serialport

soundBank.title: Sound Bank
soundBank.description: Sample library for audio synthesis. Lighter banks reduce memory usage.

banks.FluidR3_GM: Reference GM bank. Rich, detailed samples across all 128 instruments. Best overall quality but heaviest download.
banks.GeneralUserGS: High-fidelity GM/GS bank. Excellent balance of quality and size. Warm, natural-sounding instruments.
banks.JCLive: Live recording-based bank. Punchy drums, bright brass. Great for rock, jazz and live styles.
banks.Aspirin: Clean, well-balanced bank. Smooth pianos, clear strings. Good for classical and pop.
banks.SBLive: Creative Labs Sound Blaster Live bank. Solid all-rounder with nostalgic character.
banks.Chaos: Lightweight creative bank. Fast loading, basic but functional sounds for quick preview.
banks.SoundBlasterOld: Classic Sound Blaster bank. Smallest footprint, retro character. Ideal for low-bandwidth use.

update.title: System Update
update.description: Download and install the latest version
update.warning: Fetches latest changes, updates dependencies and restarts the server
update.confirmMessage:
The system will download the latest version, update dependencies and restart the server.

The application will be temporarily unavailable during the update.
update.success: Update complete! The server is restarting...
update.restartTimeout: Server is not responding. Please reload the page manually.

bluetooth.title: Bluetooth Instruments Search
bluetooth.operationMayTakeTime: This operation may take a few seconds
bluetooth.tip: Make sure your Bluetooth instrument is in pairing mode and within range (10-15m max) before starting the search.

disabled.title: Bluetooth disabled
disabled.message: The Bluetooth adapter is currently disabled.
disabled.enableMessage: Please enable it to scan for available devices.

forgetDevice.title: Forget this device?
forgetDevice.message: Do you really want to forget {deviceName}?
forgetDevice.warning: This will remove the pairing with this device.

network.title: Network Instruments Search
network.searchingDevices: Searching for devices on the network...
network.operationMayTakeTime: This operation may take a few seconds
network.tip: Make sure your instrument is connected to the same WiFi network as this device and is turned on before starting the search.

invalidIP.format:
Invalid IP address
Expected format: xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx
Example: 192.168.1.100

disconnect.title: Disconnect device
disconnect.message: Are you sure you want to disconnect this device?
disconnect.warning: The device will be disconnected and will no longer receive MIDI messages.

midiEditor.title: MIDI Editor
midiEditor.touchModeHint: Show separate buttons for move, add and resize
midiEditor.keyboardPlaybackHint: Play note when clicking the piano keyboard
midiEditor.dragPlaybackHint: Play notes when moving them (max 6 notes)
midiEditor.multipleChannelsTip: Disable channels you don't want to modify
midiEditor.singleChannelRequired: Please keep only one channel active to modify its instrument
midiEditor.multipleChannelsWarning: Multiple channels active ({count}). Please disable the channels you don't want to modify by clicking on their buttons.
midiEditor.noCCOnChannel: No CC on this channel — use tools to create some
midiEditor.noFileLoaded: No file loaded. Please open a MIDI file first.
midiEditor.libraryNotLoaded: The webaudio-pianoroll library is not loaded. Check that the script is included in index.html.
midiEditor.backendNotSupported:
The backend doesn't support MIDI file reading yet.

The "file_read" command must be added to the backend.
Meanwhile, use the classic editor.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.message: You have made changes that have not been saved.
unsavedChanges.warning: If you close now, these changes will be LOST.

midiEditor.connectedDeviceTip: Select an output device to see which notes it can play (grayed out = unplayable)
midiEditor.saveAsDescription: Save a copy with a new name
midiEditor.drawDensityTip: Minimum spacing between points in draw mode
midiEditor.moveToChannelHint: Move selected notes to the chosen channel
midiEditor.changeInstrumentHint: Change the MIDI program of the active channel
midiEditor.previewSourceHint: Choose between original GM sound or routed instrument
midiEditor.playableNotesHint: Show notes that the routed instrument can play

ui.channelToVirtualIgnored: Channel {channel} → 🎹 Virtual Instrument (ignored in backend mode)

deviceSettings.title: Device Settings
deviceSettings.midiClockDescription: Send MIDI clock signal to this device to synchronize arpeggiators, LFOs and sequencers
deviceSettings.messageRateLimitDescription: Maximum MIDI messages per second (0 = unlimited)

handsPreview.title: Hands preview
handsPreview.noHandsConfig: No hands configuration on this instrument — preview is disabled.

instrumentSettings.title: Instrument Settings
instrumentSettings.serialNumberHelp: Unique identifier to differentiate identical devices
instrumentSettings.syncDelayHelp: Positive = delay, negative = advance (for multi-instrument sync)
instrumentSettings.macAddressHelp: To associate settings with Bluetooth devices
instrumentSettings.sysexHelp: Make sure the device supports SysEx Identity Request messages.
instrumentSettings.capabilitiesHelp: Define the capabilities of this instrument to optimize MIDI routing.
instrumentSettings.noteRangeHelp: E.g.: 88-key piano = 21 (A0) to 108 (C8). Leave empty for all notes.
instrumentSettings.clickToSelect: Click on keys to define the range
instrumentSettings.gmInstrumentHelp: Select the instrument type for MIDI routing
instrumentSettings.drumKitNotice: Drum kits use MIDI channel 10 and discrete note mode. These settings will be applied automatically on save.
instrumentSettings.polyphonyHelp: Maximum number of simultaneous notes (1-128). Default: 16
instrumentSettings.midiChannelHelp: MIDI channel used by this instrument (already-used channels are disabled)
instrumentSettings.omniModeHelp: This instrument accepts notes on any MIDI channel (useful when it is the only instrument on the device)
instrumentSettings.omniModeActiveHint: This instrument receives notes on any channel — the channel selection above is ignored.
instrumentSettings.previewThisVoice: Click to preview this voice on the keyboard
instrumentSettings.timingsPerGmHint: Each GM voice can have its own timing constraints (useful when instruments have different response times).
instrumentSettings.supportedCcsHint: Shared across every GM voice on this instrument. CCs an instrument doesn't handle are simply ignored on the hardware side.
instrumentSettings.voicesShareNotes: All GM instruments play the same MIDI notes
instrumentSettings.voicesShareNotesHint: Uncheck to give each GM instrument its own playable-note capabilities.
instrumentSettings.channelOccupied: The target channel is already used by another instrument on this device.
instrumentSettings.drumChannelOccupied: Channel 10 (percussion) is already used by another instrument. Remove it first before placing a drum kit here.
instrumentSettings.voiceSaveWarning: The main settings were saved, but the additional GM voices could not be persisted
instrumentSettings.commTimeoutHelp: Maximum wait time for a response (in ms)
instrumentSettings.enableMidiClock: Send MIDI clock to this instrument
instrumentSettings.midiClockEnabledHelp: Synchronize this instrument's arpeggiators, LFOs and sequencers with the playback tempo
instrumentSettings.supportedCCsHelp: Comma-separated CC numbers. E.g.: 1=Modulation, 7=Volume, 64=Sustain. Leave empty for all CCs.
instrumentSettings.micNotAvailable: Microphone is not available in this browser.
instrumentSettings.minNoteIntervalHelp: Minimum delay between two consecutive note-on events (in ms)
instrumentSettings.minNoteDurationHelp: Minimum duration a note stays active (in ms)
instrumentSettings.pickInstrument: Pick an instrument in this family
instrumentSettings.deleteInstrumentConfirm: Clear the instrument choice for this channel?
instrumentSettings.voicesHint: Add timbre variants (e.g. fingerstyle, slap, tapping, arco/pizzicato) playing the same notes with a different actuator.
instrumentSettings.voicesEmpty: No additional voice — the primary voice is set in the Identity tab.
instrumentSettings.previewPickInstrument: 🎵 Pick an instrument to enable the preview

playlist.title: Playlists
playlist.noPlaylists: No playlists yet. Click + to create one.
playlist.emptyPlaylist: Empty playlist. Click "Add files" to add MIDI files.

autoAssign.title: Auto-Assign Channels
autoAssign.analyzing: Analyzing MIDI file and matching instruments...
autoAssign.instructions: Select the instrument for each channel. The best match is pre-selected.
autoAssign.previewAdaptedTip: Preview the adapted version with transposition
autoAssign.quickAssignTip: Automatically assign all channels with best match
autoAssign.quickAssignConfirm: Quick assign will automatically select the best instrument for each channel. Continue?
autoAssign.noActiveChannels: No active channels in this MIDI file
autoAssign.duplicateInstrumentTip: This instrument is also assigned to channel(s) {channels}
autoAssign.componentNotLoaded: Auto-assign module failed to load. Please refresh the page.
autoAssign.noteOffsetHint: Shift all drum notes (useful for mapping to a different kit)
autoAssign.previewAllTip: Preview all channels with assigned instruments
autoAssign.previewChannelTip: Preview this channel with current settings
autoAssign.strategyTransposeDesc: Shift all notes to fit instrument range
autoAssign.strategyOctaveWrapDesc: Fold out-of-range notes into nearest octave
autoAssign.strategyAutoTransposeDesc: Automatically find the best octave shift to maximize coverage
autoAssign.strategyNoteCompressionDesc: Fold out-of-range notes into instrument range
autoAssign.strategyPolyReductionDesc: Drop excess simultaneous notes to fit instrument capacity
autoAssign.strategyCCRemapDesc: Remap unsupported MIDI controllers to supported ones
autoAssign.strategyIgnoreDesc: Play as-is (out-of-range notes may be clipped)
autoAssign.oorPassThroughDesc: Instrument may clip notes outside its range
autoAssign.oorOctaveWrapDesc: Fold out-of-range notes to nearest octave
autoAssign.oorCompressDesc: Fold all out-of-range notes into playable range
autoAssign.polyStrategyShortenDesc: Reduce note overlap without removing notes
autoAssign.polyStrategyDropDesc: Drop inner voices to fit capacity
autoAssign.splitAvailableBanner: {count} channel(s) can be split across multiple instruments for better coverage
autoAssign.unsavedChangesMessage: You have modified instrument assignments, strategies, or transpositions that haven't been applied yet. Closing will discard these changes.
autoAssign.allChannelsSkipped: All channels were auto-skipped — no compatible instruments available. Please add or configure instruments in settings.

matrix.title: Matrix
matrix.selectChannel: Select a channel to see its details
matrix.selectInstrument: Select an instrument to see its details
matrix.clickToAssign: Click a cell in the matrix to assign a channel to an instrument
matrix.settingsNotAvailable: Instrument settings not available from this context

overview.selectChannelHint: Select a channel above to see available instruments

instrumentCapabilities.title: Complete Instrument Capabilities
instrumentCapabilities.subtitle: Some instruments are missing information needed for optimal auto-assignment. Please complete the required fields.
instrumentCapabilities.recommendedHint: These fields improve auto-assignment quality but are not required.
instrumentCapabilities.noteArrayPlaceholder: Enter MIDI note numbers separated by commas (e.g., 36, 38, 42, 46, 48)
instrumentCapabilities.fullSettingsHint: Access advanced configuration, latency settings, and more
instrumentCapabilities.fullSettingsComingSoon: Full instrument settings page coming soon!

drumKitsDesc.0: Versatile all-purpose kit, ideal for pop/rock/variety
drumKitsDesc.8: Ambient room reverb sound, more natural feel
drumKitsDesc.32: Soft and mellow sounds, light cymbals, jazz/bossa
drumKitsDesc.48: Timpani, orchestral bass drum, cymbals, classical/film
drumKitsDesc.56: Sound effects and noises, not a real drum kit

tablature.noStringInstrument: No string instrument configured for this channel
tablature.singleChannelRequired: Select a single channel to use tablature

drumPattern.title: Drum Pattern
drumPattern.singleChannelRequired: Select a single channel to use drum pattern
drumPattern.humanize: Randomize velocity and timing for natural feel

stringInstrument.title: String Instrument Configuration
stringInstrument.name: Instrument Name
stringInstrument.positionsTitle: Playable range (semitones above the open string)
stringInstrument.configCreated: String instrument configuration created with default preset.
stringInstrument.configExists: A string instrument configuration already exists for this device.

tuner.title: Tuner
tuner.backendUnavailable: Backend unavailable. Cannot start the tuner.
tuner.hintAuto: Free mode: play a note, the closest one will be shown
tuner.noInstrumentsConnected: No instrument connected — use a generic preset.
tuner.noConfigForInstrument: No tuning configured for this instrument — set one in the instrument settings.

calibration.title: Delay Calibration (Microphone)
calibration.thresholdHint: Increase if mic picks up ambient noise, decrease if no sound detected
calibration.measurementsHint: More measurements = more precise but longer
calibration.testDelayCategoryHint: Measures the time between sending a MIDI note and detecting the sound with the mic.
calibration.measurementOffsetHint: Subtracted from every measured delay to compensate for the mic/ALSA chain latency.

routingSummary.title: Automatic Routing
routingSummary.selectChannelHint: Click a channel to view details and edit assignment
routingSummary.saveDialogMessage: The MIDI file needs to be modified. How would you like to save?
routingSummary.splitChannelInfo: Channels will be duplicated for multi-instrument.
routingSummary.ccUnknown: CCs not configured — assumed all supported
routingSummary.behaviorOverflowDesc: Excess notes overflow to instrument B when A reaches its polyphony limit
routingSummary.behaviorCombineNoOverlapDesc: Each instrument handles a distinct note range with no overlap
routingSummary.behaviorCombineWithOverlapDesc: Both instruments share common notes in an overlap zone
routingSummary.behaviorAlternateDesc: Rapidly alternating notes are distributed between instruments

scoringSettings.title: Auto-assignment settings
scoringSettings.globalRoutingDesc: Global options for automatic MIDI channel routing.
scoringSettings.allowInstrumentReuseDesc: Allows assigning the same instrument to multiple MIDI channels when there are not enough instruments available. Prevents automatic muting of excess channels.
scoringSettings.sharedPenaltyDesc: Score reduction displayed for shared assignments
scoringSettings.autoSplitAvoidTranspositionDesc: Split a channel between multiple instruments to avoid transposition
scoringSettings.preferSingleInstrumentDesc: Avoid splitting a channel between multiple instruments when possible
scoringSettings.preferSimilarGMTypeDesc: Favor instruments whose GM type matches the channel
scoringSettings.weightsDesc: Adjust the importance of each criterion in the total score (sum = 100)
scoringSettings.drumWeightsDesc: Criteria distribution for the percussion channel (sum = 100)
scoringSettings.drumFallbackDesc: Action when a note is missing per percussion category.
scoringSettings.drumChainDesc: Click on the substitution chain to set the allowed replacement depth. Notes on the left have priority.
scoringSettings.drumSubstituteDesc: Replace with the closest available note
scoringSettings.presetBalancedDesc: General-purpose profile suited for most setups
scoringSettings.presetOrchestralDesc: Prioritizes instrument type and GM program for classical ensembles
scoringSettings.presetPopRockDesc: Emphasizes note range and physical playability for band instruments
scoringSettings.presetElectronicDesc: Favors GM synth programs and tolerates wide transpositions
scoringSettings.presetJazzDesc: Prioritizes timbre and instrument type for jazz formations
scoringSettings.presetDrumsFocusedDesc: Maximizes percussion mapping quality and channel 10 bonus
scoringSettings.presetMinimalDesc: Permissive thresholds and limited splits for small setups
